allow: PowerShell($routes = @\('/', '/login', '/register', '/onboarding', '/dashboard', '/dashboard/events', '/dashboard/events/1', '/dashboard/events/1/register', '/dashboard/events/1/register/success', '/dashboard/events/1/ticket', '/dashboard/orgs', '/dashboard/profile'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $code = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \("http://localhost:3000" + $r\) -Method Get -TimeoutSec 20 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $code = "ERR:" + $_.Exception.Message }; "{0,-50} {1}" -f $r, $code })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/dashboard -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "СФУ·Вектор header: $\($html -match 'СФУ.Вектор'\)"; "ContextSwitcher trigger \(Иван Петров\): $\($html -match 'Иван Петров'\)"; "Sub label \(Личный профиль\): $\($html -match 'Личный профиль'\)")

PowerShell($routes = @\('/', '/login', '/register', '/onboarding', '/dashboard', '/dashboard/events', '/dashboard/events/1', '/dashboard/events/1/register', '/dashboard/events/1/register/success', '/dashboard/events/1/ticket', '/dashboard/orgs', '/dashboard/profile'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $code = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \("http://localhost:3000" + $r\) -Method Get -TimeoutSec 20 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop\).StatusCode } catch { $code = "ERR" }; "{0,-50} {1}" -f $r, $code })
